name: code_review
description: Perform an expert-level code review with the depth of a principal engineer. Covers correctness, performance, resilience, architecture, maintainability, and AI/LLM-specific concerns. Trigger when a user shares code, a diff, a PR link, or asks 'is this production-ready?'.

code.description: The code snippet, diff, or patch to review.

language.description: Programming language of the code (e.g. 'go', 'python', 'typescript'). Infer if not provided.

context.description: Optional system or service context: what the code does, Go version, dependencies, scale requirements, internal vs customer-facing.

review_mode.description: Review depth. 'full' (default) covers all 6 dimensions. 'surgical' focuses on the dimension specified in focus_dimension but still surfaces any P0 blockers.

focus_dimension.description: Only used when review_mode is 'surgical'. The primary dimension to focus on.
